title: Magic the Gathering Deck Shuffler
full_text:
Play any deck, anywhere, with your favorite people!
 

 

 

Choose
 

any deck
 

Play any Commander precon.
Play anyone's deck from Archidekt.
 BEGIN
 

 

 

 

Prepare
 

the table
 

One board in Miro or Mural becomes your shared tabletop.
 

 

 

 

Enter
 

the chat
 

The game really happens in Discord.
